---
title: "Environmental & Occupational Health Support"
description: "Evidence-based support for environmental and occupational health programs, protecting communities and workers from health hazards."
---

# Environmental & Occupational Health Support

EpiPulse provides comprehensive support for addressing environmental and occupational health challenges in communities and workplaces.

## Environmental Health Services

### Environmental Health Assessment
- Environmental hazard identification and assessment
- Water quality evaluation and improvement
- Sanitation and hygiene system strengthening
- Air quality monitoring and management
- Chemical and waste management protocols
- Climate and health vulnerability assessment

### Communicable Disease & Environment
- Vector surveillance and control
- Water-borne disease prevention
- Contamination monitoring
- Environmental remediation support
- Community resilience building

### Environmental Public Health Programs
- Water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) implementation
- Waste management program design
- Pollution reduction initiatives
- Lead screening and mitigation
- Environmental health education

## Occupational Health Services

### Workplace Health & Safety Assessment
- Occupational hazard analysis
- Worker health risk assessment
- Health and safety audit
- Safety protocols development
- Workplace infrastructure evaluation

### Occupational Disease Prevention
- Occupational disease surveillance
- Health screening programs
- Hazard control measures
- Personal protective equipment (PPE) optimization
- Worker education and training

### Workplace Health Programs
- Occupational health and safety management systems
- Health and safety committee support
- Accident and incident investigation
- Medical surveillance frameworks
- Health promotion at work

### Vulnerable Worker Protection
- Informal sector health protection
- Migrant worker health programs
- Construction worker safety
- Agricultural worker health
- Child labor health monitoring

## One Health Approaches

**Integrated Assessment**
- Human-animal-environment interactions
- Zoonotic disease prevention
- Food safety systems
- Antimicrobial stewardship
- Emerging infection preparedness

## Implementation Support

- **Risk Assessment**: Comprehensive environmental & occupational hazard analysis
- **Program Design**: Evidence-based intervention frameworks
- **Health Worker Training**: Competency building for implementation
- **Community Engagement**: Participation and ownership
- **Monitoring Systems**: Real-time surveillance and data
- **Research**: Operations and implementation research

## Tools & Resources

### Assessment Tools
- Environmental health assessment checklists
- Occupational hazard identification tools
- Worker health screening protocols
- Monitoring and evaluation frameworks

### Educational Materials
- Environmental health guidelines
- Occupational safety protocols
- Worker education resources
- Community awareness materials

## Who We Support

- Government health and labor departments
- NGOs and community organizations
- Workplace safety committees
- Informal sector groups
- Manufacturing and industrial facilities
- Agricultural communities
- Construction sector organizations

## Building Healthier Environments

For environmental and occupational health support:

**Email**: programs@epipulse.org  
**Partner With Us**: [Contact](contact.qmd)

---

*Creating safer communities and workplaces through evidence-based environmental and occupational health action.*
